title: Lesson Title
objectives: Learner can understand the main lesson goal.
Learner can use the target vocabulary or pattern in a simple sentence.

grammar.practicePrompt: Write or say one sentence using the pattern.

pronunciation.focus: Sound, stress, or phrase rhythm to practice.

culture.title: Culture Note
culture.text: Short context about real-world Spanish usage.

nativeSpeech.title: How Native Speakers Say It
notes: Short note about natural phrasing, speed, or common alternatives.

speakingChallenge.prompt: Say a short sentence using today's vocabulary.

realLifeMission.title: Real Life Mission
realLifeMission.mission: Use today's lesson in a realistic conversation.
successCriteria: Use at least one target vocabulary item.
Use the lesson's main grammar or communication pattern.
Complete the interaction with a natural closing.
